title: Chat with Raya on WhatsApp
blurb: Link your Zaryah Plus account to WhatsApp so Raya can answer you wherever you are — same Raya, same memory, no app required.

features.islamic: Sourced answers to Quran and hadith questions.
features.reminders: Reminders that fire on time, in your timezone.
features.voice: Voice notes welcome — Raya listens and replies.
features.barka: Your gratitude (Barka Labs) stays in sync.

waiting.primary: WhatsApp should have opened with a pre-filled message — just tap send to finish linking.

linked.heading: WhatsApp linked
linked.subtitle: Raya is connected to your WhatsApp at {{phone}}.

unlink_modal.heading: Unlink WhatsApp?
unlink_modal.body: Raya will stop responding on WhatsApp until you link again. Your conversation history stays on your account.

errors.mint_failed: Couldn't prepare the link — please try again in a moment.
